# Place trained ncnn model files here:
# - yolov8n_signs.param  (model architecture)
# - yolov8n_signs.bin    (model weights)
#
# These files are generated by Member 4 after:
#   1. Training YOLOv8n on Google Colab (train_colab.py)
#   2. Exporting to ONNX (export_model.py)
#   3. Converting to ncnn (convert_to_ncnn.py)
#
# Note: .param and .bin files are in .gitignore (too large).
# Share them via Google Drive with the team.
